internships.description: Working as a Full Stack Developer, building modern web applications using React, Node.js, and various databases. Implementing secure authentication, RESTful APIs, and deploying applications on cloud platforms.
Completed intensive training in Full Stack Development, learning modern web technologies, database management, and deployment strategies.

projects.title: Smilestones Child Development Centre
projects.description: Official website for Smilestones - A Centre for Child Development and Learning with Dr. P. Sudhakar
projects.longDescription: Successfully launched the official website for Smilestones – A Centre for Child Development and Learning. This platform was designed to create a modern, fast, and accessible digital experience for parents, healthcare professionals, and educators seeking guidance in child development and therapy services. Built for Dr. P. Sudhakar (MD Ped, Dip. Developmental Neurology, QBA, IBA, Former Professor of Pediatrics), who has been working in Developmental Pediatrics since 2010, dedicated to early diagnosis, intervention, and therapy support for children with developmental challenges. Combines technology with healthcare to help families access developmental support more easily.
features: Fully mobile, tablet, and desktop optimized
Admin panel for doctors and therapists
Fast page load with Next.js optimization
Accessible digital gateway for parents and professionals
projects.challenges: Building a comprehensive healthcare platform with clinical assessment tools (M-CHAT, DSM-5), implementing secure EMR modules for patient data management, creating PDF report generation for developmental assessments, integrating therapy session tracking for doctors and therapists, and ensuring HIPAA-compliant design while maintaining accessibility for parents and healthcare professionals.

projects.title: FunPrints - 3D Custom T-Shirt Platform
projects.description: Modern and interactive platform for designing and exploring custom T-shirts in real time with 3D visualization
projects.longDescription: Successfully completed FunPrints, a modern and interactive platform for designing and exploring custom T-shirts in real time. This project demonstrates how immersive 3D web experiences combined with smart form automation can enhance modern e-commerce platforms. Features interactive 3D T-shirt customization with multi-angle views (Front, Side, Back), logo upload with live preview, and smart pincode auto-fill that automatically fetches City, State, and Town. Built with React Three Fiber for 3D rendering and optimized for high performance with smooth animations.
features: Instantly see your design on the T-shirt
Automatically fetches City, State, and Town
Fully responsive design across all devices
projects.challenges: Implementing real-time 3D T-shirt rendering with Three.js and React Three Fiber, ensuring smooth performance across devices while handling 3D graphics, integrating smart pincode-based auto-fill for address detection, optimizing 3D model loading times, and creating an intuitive UI for logo upload and live preview on the 3D model.

projects.title: TFC - Thozha Fried Chicken & BBQ | Online Food Ordering System
projects.description: Complete end-to-end food ordering web application for TFC restaurant in Nasiyanur, Erode
projects.longDescription: Developed a complete end-to-end food ordering web application for client Kavin Kumar – TFC (Thozha Fried Chicken & BBQ), a fast-growing restaurant in Nasiyanur, Erode. This platform helps customers browse menu, place orders, and choose multiple payment options while enabling the admin to manage everything in real-time. Features online menu browsing, cart & checkout system, order tracking, automatic email confirmations, WhatsApp quick order button, and comprehensive admin dashboard for managing orders, products, and categories.
projects.challenges: Building a real-time food ordering system with Firebase, implementing multiple payment options including auto-generated UPI QR codes, creating an intuitive admin dashboard for restaurant management, integrating WhatsApp and email notifications, and ensuring smooth order tracking workflow from pending to completed status.

projects.title: Mediestate CRM - Real Estate Web Application
projects.description: Modern CRM & real estate platform for property investment services targeting doctors and medical professionals
projects.longDescription: Successfully developed and deployed Mediestate CRM & Real Estate Web Application — a modern, SEO-optimized platform built to help real estate advisors deliver premium property investment services for doctors and medical professionals. Features comprehensive CRM dashboard, campaign automation with scheduled email marketing, admin analytics with daily summary reports, and automation control center. Built with Next.js 14, Neon PostgreSQL, and deployed on Vercel with serverless functions and cron jobs.
features: CRM dashboard for lead management & tracking
Campaign automation with scheduled email marketing
Admin analytics with daily summary reports
projects.challenges: Building a comprehensive CRM system with automation workflows, implementing scheduled email campaigns with cron jobs, integrating serverless PostgreSQL for scalability, creating an intuitive admin dashboard with analytics, and ensuring secure authentication for sensitive real estate and client data.

projects.title: Medi Events - Healthcare Conference & Events Platform
projects.description: Official website for Dr. P. Sudhakar - First developmental pediatrician in India licensed in ABA from QABA Board, USA
projects.longDescription: Developed and launched the official website for Dr. P. Sudhakar, Developmental Pediatrician & Applied Behavior Analyst - the first developmental pediatrician in India licensed to practice Applied Behavior Analysis (ABA) from the QABA Board, USA. Built with modern tech stack featuring Next.js App Router, TypeScript, and premium UI/UX. Designed to support medical conferences, healthcare summits, academic workshops, and professional networking events with a professional and trustworthy digital presence aligned with international standards.
features: Dynamic SEO metadata on every page
projects.challenges: Creating a professional healthcare platform that meets international standards, implementing Apple Dock-style navigation with smooth animations, ensuring accessibility compliance for medical professionals, and optimizing performance while maintaining premium UI/UX for medical conferences and events.

projects.title: Dream Travel Agency - Premium Travel Booking Platform
projects.description: Modern travel booking website with email/WhatsApp integration for Dream Travel Agency, Damoh, MP
projects.longDescription: Built a premium travel booking platform for client Mr. Nikhil - Dream Travel Agency in Damoh, Madhya Pradesh. This project focuses on trust, performance, SEO visibility, and premium UI/UX designed specifically for the travel industry. Features email + WhatsApp based booking system with real tour packages including Kashmir, Kerala, Sikkim, Varanasi, and more. Built with Next.js 15 for speed & scalability with glassmorphism UI and smart package recommendations.
features: Real tour packages: Kashmir (₹22,500), Kerala (₹72,500), Sikkim (₹56,800), Gangtok & Darjeeling (₹16,699), Mathura-Vrindavan (₹5,999), Pushkar-Khatu Shyam-Jaipur (₹3,200), Varanasi-Ayodhya-Chitrakoot-Prayagraj (₹15,000)
projects.challenges: Building a trust-focused travel booking platform with premium UI/UX, implementing smart package recommendation system based on user behavior, integrating dual booking channels (Email + WhatsApp), and optimizing for local SEO visibility in Damoh, Madhya Pradesh while maintaining fast performance.

projects.title: Web Deo - Official Website
projects.description: Lead Full-Stack Developer & AI Automation Engineer for Web Deo's official website launch
projects.longDescription: Proud to lead the successful launch of the Web Deo official website as Lead Full-Stack Developer & AI Automation Engineer. Web Deo is a Chennai-based digital agency with 100+ projects completed, 50+ happy clients, 23+ team members, and 99% client satisfaction. I was responsible for system architecture, backend engineering, frontend development, AI automation integration, and production deployment.
features: Premium glassmorphism UI with blur effects
Dark / Light mode with smooth transitions
Framer Motion animations for modern UX
projects.challenges: Leading the complete technical architecture from planning to production, implementing premium glassmorphism UI with performance optimization, integrating AI automation workflows, and ensuring scalability for a growing digital agency platform.

projects.title: MedFoxRCM - Healthcare Revenue Cycle Management Platform
projects.description: Fully responsive Healthcare RCM website with medical coding course registration system
projects.longDescription: MedFoxRCM is a fully responsive and production-ready Healthcare RCM website built with Next.js 14. It combines business service presentation with a complete medical coding course registration system. Features modern UI/UX with brand-based theming, animations, and secure email automation for course registrations.
features: Modern UI/UX with brand-based theming & animations
RCM service modules: Medical Billing, Coding & Audit, Consulting
Fully responsive design for mobile, tablet & desktop
projects.challenges: Creating a professional healthcare industry website that combines service presentation with a functional course registration system, implementing secure email automation, and ensuring HIPAA-compliant design considerations.

projects.title: ISC Textile Report App - Digital Printing Management
projects.description: Digital textile printing & production management system for Indian Soft Colours
projects.longDescription: Built for client Indian Soft Colours (ISC) - Mr. P. Baskaran. A fully digital textile printing & production management system that replaces manual registers with real-time tracking, reporting, analytics, and export capabilities. Optimized for mobile, tablet, and desktop with PWA support for offline access.
features: Smart Record Management - Add, Edit, Delete with confirmation
Search, sort & filter by date ranges (Today, Week, Month, Custom)
Detailed data fields: Date, Party DC No, Padding DC No, Party Name, Fabric Quality, Party Mtr, Padding Mtr, Short/Excess Mtr, Print Mtr, Outward Mtr, Balance
Dashboard & Analytics with total records, meters, and live metrics
Color-coded metrics and recent activity feed
PDF Export with auto-formatted tables, company logo, portrait/landscape modes, page numbering
Excel Export with clean spreadsheets compatible with MS Excel & Google Sheets
PWA - Installable on Android, iPhone, Windows, macOS
projects.challenges: Transforming paper-based textile workflow into a digital system, implementing complex PDF/Excel export with custom formatting, ensuring offline functionality with PWA, and creating an intuitive UI for non-technical textile workers.

projects.title: API Trichy Chapter - Official Website
projects.description: Complete digital platform for API Tiruchirappalli Chapter physicians
projects.longDescription: Proud to launch the official full-stack website for API Tiruchirappalli Chapter - a modern, elegant, information-rich hub for doctors with events, CME programs, publications, leadership details, media content, and member engagement features. Built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and Prisma ORM.
features: Premium UI with custom API Trichy branding
Home with hero, quick links, upcoming events
About Us - Chapter history and mission
projects.challenges: Building a comprehensive CMS with role-based access control, managing multiple content types (events, publications, media), and creating an elegant medical-themed UI that appeals to physicians.

projects.title: Smart Irrigation System using ARIMAX Model
projects.description: AI-powered irrigation system with predictive analytics using ARIMAX model
projects.longDescription: Developed an intelligent irrigation system that uses the ARIMAX (AutoRegressive Integrated Moving Average with eXogenous variables) model to predict optimal watering schedules. The system analyzes weather patterns, soil moisture, temperature, and humidity data to automate irrigation, reducing water waste and improving crop yield. Built with Python, FastAPI, and IoT sensor integration.
projects.challenges: Training the ARIMAX model with limited historical data, integrating IoT sensors for real-time monitoring, and ensuring system reliability in varying weather conditions.

projects.title: Auto WhatsApp Reminder AI
projects.description: AI-powered automated WhatsApp reminder system with smart login
projects.longDescription: Developed an intelligent WhatsApp reminder system using full-stack development with AI integration. Features an AI-generated login page with smart authentication. The system automatically sends reminders via WhatsApp based on scheduled events, appointments, or custom triggers. Utilizes AI for natural language processing, smart scheduling, and secure user authentication.
projects.challenges: Integrating WhatsApp API, implementing AI for intelligent scheduling and login page generation, and ensuring reliable message delivery across different time zones.

projects.title: Hospital Management System
projects.description: Full-stack hospital management application with React and MongoDB
projects.longDescription: Built a comprehensive hospital management system using React.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. Features include patient management, appointment scheduling, doctor management, and medical records. Frontend deployed on Vercel, backend on Render, and database on MongoDB Atlas.
projects.challenges: Managing complex relationships between patients, doctors, and appointments. Ensuring data security and HIPAA compliance considerations.

projects.title: User Management System
projects.description: Full-stack web application for secure user management
projects.longDescription: Developed a comprehensive user management system with secure registration, login, and CRUD-based profile management. Built using HTML, CSS, JavaScript for frontend and Node.js, Express, MySQL for backend. Implements best practices for security and data validation.
projects.challenges: Implementing secure password hashing, session management, and ensuring data validation on both client and server side.

projects.title: Online Petition Management System
projects.description: A secure full-stack petition platform with multilingual UI and analytics
projects.longDescription: Developed a comprehensive petition management system using React, Node.js, and MySQL. Features include JWT authentication, file uploads, multilingual user interface, real-time analytics dashboard, and secure data management. Successfully deployed on Render (backend) and Vercel (frontend).
projects.challenges: Implementing secure authentication, handling file uploads efficiently, and creating a scalable analytics system for real-time petition tracking.
